task_scores.task_title: Phase 1 — Backend Mock Data Layer (mock_welders, generate_frames_for_arc, prototype)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Frame params miss target score bands → prototype fails → seed produces wrong badge distribution; demo shows false declining/improving.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundation for entire plan; prototype ties validation to production path; well-specified file paths and pass bands.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 2 — Seed & Wipe (route, wipe, seed_demo_data, pre-flight)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Empty WELDER_ARCHETYPES or expected_count==0 skip leaves demo broken; pre-flight structure assertion catches it.
task_scores.reasoning: Pre-flight checks, spot-check operator_id, and empty expected_count fail-fast address prior critique gaps.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 — Dashboard (10 cards, badges, fetchScore with timeout)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: sessionCount KeyError if WELDERS entry lacks sessionCount; badges invert if last/prev swapped; pre-flight structure guards welder_id and sessions.
task_scores.reasoning: Primary demo outcome; '3 improving, 2 declining' lands on this view; 5s timeout and Promise.allSettled reduce failure blast radius.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 4 — Welder Report (historicalScores, expert baseline, last-slot fix)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Last-slot fetch fail → 0 in historicalScores → false 'declining'; Step 4.4 correctly uses sc.total for last slot.
task_scores.reasoning: Drill-down credibility; Step 4.4 fix is well-documented; E2E gate blocks merge if manual verification not done.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 5 — Tests (test_mock_welders, test_dev_routes, prototype in CI)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Prototype not in CI → refactor breaks score bands; test_prototype_arc_scoring_exits_zero mitigates.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Run prototype before Phase 2 in pre-flight; defer full Step 5.3 to manual if test infra gaps.
task_scores.reasoning: High leverage (CI catches regressions); dep on Phases 1–4; Step 5.3 last-slot test may be manual fallback.

critical_issues: Step 4.3 gate: If E2E not set up, PR checklist blocks merge until manual Step 4.4; but there is no explicit PR checklist template or enforcement mechanism in the plan
minor_issues: WELDER_SESSION_COUNT duplicated in page.tsx and welder/[id]/page.tsx — 11th archetype requires two edits
Session ID migration (sess_expert_001 → sess_expert-benchmark_005) may break existing bookmarks; migration path under-specified for deploy
suggestions: Add a pre-merge checklist file (e.g. .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) with 'Step 4.4 manual verification completed' when E2E absent
Document exact grep for Step 1.1 tuning: grep -n 'base\|delta' backend/data/mock_sessions.py for quick param location
Add concrete Python one-liner for 'delete one session' partial-seed check to seed_demo_data verification section
dependency_order: Phase 1 before Phase 2 (seed needs generate_session_for_welder). Phase 2 before Phase 3 and 4 (dashboard/report need seeded data). Phase 3 and 4 can run in parallel after Phase 2. Phase 5 depends on Phases 1–4.
premortem_top_risk: Frame params in generate_frames_for_arc fail to hit PASS_BANDS after extract_features/score_session changes; prototype exits 1; team tunes rules instead of frames and introduces production drift.
goal_alignment_notes: Plan directly serves enterprise demo goal: 10 welders with distinct arcs, visible badges, credible drill-down. Refinements (pre-flight, empty fail-fast, last-slot fix, spot-check) close prior failure modes. 16h estimate is reasonable; visible outcome (10 cards) within 48h if Phases 1–2–3 shipped first.
